thread.title: Donald Trump tells U.S. Senate Republicans they ‘must kill’ journalist shield law | News | paysonroundup.com
thread.title_full: Donald Trump tells U.S. Senate Republicans they ‘must kill’ journalist shield law | News | paysonroundup.com

author: Jacob Fischler States Newsroom
title: Donald Trump tells U.S. Senate Republicans they ‘must kill’ journalist shield law | News | paysonroundup.com
text:
President-elect Donald Trump ordered congressional Republicans on Wednesday to block a broadly popular bill to protect press freedoms, likely ending any chance of the U.S. Senate clearing the legislation.
The [measure](https://www.congress.gov/bill/118th-congress/house-bill/4250/text) would limit federal law enforcement surveillance of journalists and the government’s ability to force disclosure of journalists’ sources, codifying regulations the Department of Justice has put in place under President Joe Biden.
